last_assistant_message:
## Report

**Status:** FEAT-259 complete. Build green, all targeted tests pass, commit landed.

**Commit:** `ba911ec0` on `chore/transcript-ingest-followups` (parent `22be7b7e`) â€” exactly 7 files changed, 130 insertions / 16 deletions.

**Files touched:**
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/IdempotencyConflictException.cs` (new) â€” exception carries `IdempotencyKey` for telemetry.
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/IdempotencyCache.cs` â€” `TryGet`/`Store` now use `CachedEntry(Payload, BodyHash)`; `Entry` wraps `CachedEntry + StoredAt`.
- `src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptIngestService.cs` â€” added `ComputeBodyHash` (SHA-256 of `event/session/project/agent/turns(Role,Text)` JSON, skipping `captured_at`, `cwd`, scrub counters, `client_version`); compares hash on cache hit and throws `IdempotencyConflictException` on mismatch; stores hash alongside payload.
- `src/AstraMemory.Api/Controllers/TranscriptIngestController.cs` â€” try/catch around `IngestAsync`, returns `409 Conflict` with `error: "idempotency_conflict"`, `detail`, and `idempotency_key`.
- `tests/AstraMemory.Tests/TranscriptIngest/IdempotencyCacheTests.cs` â€” updated 3 existing tests to the new `CachedEntry` shape.
- `tests/AstraMemory.Tests/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptIngestServiceTests.cs` â€” appended 2 tests (conflict throws; same key + same body still replays).
- `tests/AstraMemory.Tests/Controllers/TranscriptIngestControllerTests.cs` â€” appended 1 test asserting `ConflictObjectResult`.

**Test output:** `Passed: 19, Failed: 0, Skipped: 0, Total: 19, Duration: 114 ms`. (The plan estimated 16; the actual pre-existing count in `TranscriptIngestServiceTests` was 8 rather than 6, so totals come out to 19 = 3 cache + 10 service + 6 controller. All 3 net new tests pass, both existing idempotency replay tests still pass.)

**Build:** `0 Error(s)`, warnings unchanged from baseline (pre-existing NU1507 source-mapping warnings + 3 unrelated CS warnings).

**Self-review checklist:**
- `IdempotencyConflictException` exposes `IdempotencyKey` for logs/telemetry â€” done.
- Hash is deterministic across runs (SHA-256, no salt, ordered anonymous-type serialization) â€” done.
- Same-key-same-body replays (existing test `IngestAsync_replays_cached_response_for_repeated_idempotency_key` still passes; new test `IngestAsync_does_not_throw_for_same_key_same_body` confirms) â€” done.
- Different tenants, same key, independent (existing test `IngestAsync_different_tenants_with_same_key_do_not_share_cache` still passes; cache key remains `{TenantId}:{Key}`) â€” done.
- 7 files in commit â€” done.

**Concerns:** None blocking. Minor notes:
- Body hash excludes `cmd.Turns[].Ts` by design (the plan calls for `Role` + `Text` only). If timestamps must contribute to identity later, revisit.
- The pre-existing comment on line ~15 of `TranscriptIngestService.cs` (`// Idempotency cache is wired now so Task 1.6 can add replay...`) is now stale but was left untouched to keep the diff scoped to FEAT-259.

background_tasks.description: Wait until PR mergeable state resolves
background_tasks.command: cd "C:/work/mega/memory" && until [ "$(gh pr view 288 --json mergeable -q .mergeable)" != "UNKNOWN" ]; do sleep 15; done && echo "mergeable: $(gh pr view 288 --json mergeable -q .mergeable)" && gh pr checks 288 2>&1 | head -20
